parameters.description: Baseline transformation efficiency range for high-efficiency chemically competent E. coli transformed with pUC19-like plasmid DNA.

citations.authors: Inoue H, Nojima H, Okayama H
citations.title: High efficiency transformation of Escherichia coli with plasmids
citations.tier_justification: Canonical transformation-efficiency paper cited in the LabCraft plan as the foundational Gold source for chemical transformation parameters.

citations.title: Studies on transformation of Escherichia coli with plasmids
citations.tier_justification: Foundational, heavily cited plasmid transformation methodology paper explicitly named in the LabCraft MVP task list.

citations.title: NEB 5-alpha Competent E. coli
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor specification page reporting the product's validated transformation-efficiency range.

parameters.description: Efficiency penalty when DNA/cell incubation on ice is shorter than the cited 30-minute protocol recommendation.

citations.title: High Efficiency Transformation Protocol
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor protocol stating that shortening the 30-minute DNA/cell ice incubation by 10 minutes can halve transformation efficiency.

parameters.description: Protocol-optimal heat shock duration for NEB high-efficiency chemical transformation.

citations.title: High Efficiency Transformation Protocol
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor protocol specifying a 30-second heat shock at 42 C.

parameters.description: Efficiency penalty when outgrowth is shorter than the cited 60-minute recovery recommendation.

citations.title: High Efficiency Transformation Protocol
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor protocol stating that each 15-minute reduction from the 60-minute outgrowth can halve transformation efficiency.

parameters.description: Relative efficiency improvement from SOC outgrowth versus LB during the recovery step.

citations.title: High Efficiency Transformation Protocol
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor protocol stating that SOC gives roughly two-fold higher transformation efficiency than LB.

parameters.description: Relative efficiency improvement from shaking during outgrowth.

citations.title: High Efficiency Transformation Protocol
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor protocol stating that shaking during outgrowth improves transformation efficiency by roughly two-fold.

parameters.description: Recommended ampicillin concentration for NEB 5-alpha transformation selection plates.

citations.title: NEB 5-alpha Competent E. coli
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor product page listing the recommended ampicillin selection concentration.

parameters.description: Standard countable colony range for interpreting a plate-based colony enumeration result.

citations.title: BAM Chapter 3: Aerobic Plate Count
citations.tier_justification: Official FDA Bacteriological Analytical Manual chapter specifying a countable range of 25-250 colonies per plate for standard plate counts.
